message:
fix: Saturating arithmetic in filepicker draw_line; fix clippy lints

- filepicker.rs: Use saturating_add for cell_x coordinate in
  draw_line() to prevent u16 overflow with wide text at large offsets
- forms_input.rs: Collapse nested if-let into let-chains per clippy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
